DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, JUSTINIANO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, JUSTINIANO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YES, GRACIELA YES, MARTA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2321 BRYANT ST, 3D ROOM LEFT OF KITCHEN, LEASE FORFEITED
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN DOE
